name: Sprott Uranium Miners ETF
description: The Sprott Uranium Miners ETF (URNM) seeks to invest in companies that derive at least 50% of their revenue from uranium mining, exploration, development, and production, or from holding physical uranium, owning uranium royalties, or other non-mining activities that support the uranium mining industry. The Fund tracks the North Shore Global Uranium Mining Index, providing investors with exposure to the global uranium sector. This includes producers, developers, and explorers, as well as vehicles that hold physical uranium, offering a comprehensive approach to the nuclear energy fuel cycle.
